name_en: M13922 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Bag! A classic from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series, reinterpreting the Monogram pattern with the artist Takashi Murakami's signature rainbow tones. The Monogram features a smartphone-specific pocket and can also hold keys, a passport, credit cards, and cash. Easily store personal essentials, the perfect travel companion. Size 19Cmx10cm.
